chapter_title: Jefferson & Orange Cnty. Pilots Licensing and Regul. Act

markdown:
# Transp. Code
## Title 4
### Chapter 69. Jefferson & Orange Cnty. Pilots Licensing and Regul. Act
##### § 69.021 — Contested Case Notice

The board shall give notice in each contested case to the persons and in the manner provided by Section 69.020 (Rule or Rate Change) (b) that includes the same information as the notice given to the parties in each contested case.

*Added by Acts 2003, 78th Leg., ch. 745, Sec. 1, eff. June 20, 2003.*

subsections.text: The board shall give notice in each contested case to the persons and in the manner provided by Section 69.020 (Rule or Rate Change) (b) that includes the same information as the notice given to the parties in each contested case.
